error.entity_no_coordinates: The selected entity does not have location coordinates.
error.entity_not_found: The selected entity was not found in the entity registry.

data_description.location_entity: Select a person, device tracker, or zone to dynamically track weather for its location. When set, coordinates update automatically as the entity moves.

user.description: If a METAR station code is not specified, the latitude and longitude will be used to find the closest station. For now, the API key can be anything. It is recommended to use a valid email address.
user.title: Connect to the National Weather Service

get_forecasts_extra.description: Retrieves extra data for weather forecasts.

type.description: The scope of the weather forecast.
type.name: Forecast type

get_forecasts_extra.name: Get extra forecasts data
